titleStmt.title: SII 23.344: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 344. (A.R. No. 344 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year lost

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. It records the gift of 28 kāśu for burning a lamp in the temple by one Śrīrāmabhaṭṭa-Sōmayājiyār a member of a committee (of the assembly) of Śōḻamāttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of which Tiruviśalūr was a part.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iru nila maṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyun tiruttaṉic celviyun taṉ perun tevi
yarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭutuyil Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻma
tiḷk koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇarkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyarta muṭiyumāṅkavar teviyar Ōṅkeḻi
l muṭiyu muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuṉtaramuṭiyum Intivaramum teṉṟicai Īḻamaṇṭalam muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ
kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ tolperuṅkāval palapaḻantivum ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattoru
rukāl Aracukaḷaik kaṭṭa ṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāna
śrī rājentracoḻa� kavaḷanāṭṭu brahmateyam coḻamāt tāṇṭa catu
rvetimaṅkalattu ti devarkku kaṇattāruḷ ce mpūr cirāmapaṭṭa comāciyār cantrātitaval nittam
Oru muḻuviḷakku Erippataṟkku vaitta kācu 2 10 8 I
viḷakku Avvavāṇṭu śrī kāriyam ceyyum tevar
kaṉmikaḷe muṭṭāmal Erikkaṭavārkaḷ Itu paṉma
hāyeśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 23.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
